ci.title: Cast iron, production-ready
ci.body: Motor bodies, pump housings and industrial components in consistent CI grades — machined, inspected and shipped for repeat OEM volumes.

aluminum.title: Lightweight, dimensionally tight
aluminum.body: High-pressure aluminum die cast parts for motor enclosures, auto components and precision assemblies — from prototype to full production runs.

die.title: Complex geometry, one roof
die.body: Pressure die casting for intricate aluminum parts with tight tolerances — reducing assembly steps and lead time for OEM engineering teams.

brands.headlineLine2: Built for motors, pumps and automotive.

card1.quote: Consistent material quality and predictable lead times — the two things that actually matter when you're scaling a motor line.
card1.author: Procurement Manager

card2.quote: We replaced two job-shop suppliers with Diti Engineers. Single source for CI and aluminum, fewer late shipments.
card2.author: Purchase Head

card3.quote: Repeat CI motor body runs ship on schedule. One Rajkot partner covers casting through dispatch.
card3.author: Plant Manager

card4.quote: Pump housings and impeller castings arrive dimensionally stable — our assembly line stays predictable.
card4.author: Operations Lead

card5.quote: Automotive casting programs need tight tolerances. Diti delivers aluminum and pressure die from one roof.
card5.author: Sourcing Manager

card6.quote: GST-registered invoicing and export documentation from day one — finance cleared our vendor onboarding fast.
card6.author: Finance Controller

card7.quote: Found Diti on IndiaMART, stayed for 13+ years of repeat orders. Direct manufacturer, no trading markup.
card7.author: Vendor Development

card8.quote: In-house CI and aluminum under one quality system — fewer audits, fewer surprises on the floor.
card8.author: Quality Head

card9.quote: Submitted a drawing on Monday, had price guidance by Tuesday. That speed wins programs for us.

hero.subtitle: Diti Engineers manufactures CI, aluminum and pressure die castings for motors, pumps and automotive OEMs — with 13+ years of factory-backed production.

heroSection.headline: Built on engineering excellence in Rajkot
heroSection.body1: Diti Engineers manufactures CI, aluminum and pressure die castings for electric motors, submersible pumps and automotive OEMs — delivering application-specific components with dimensional accuracy and reliable material grades.
heroSection.body2: From Rajkot, Gujarat — India's casting hub — we combine modern manufacturing capability with the responsiveness procurement teams need when scaling production volumes.
heroSection.ctaPrompt: Ready to partner with a casting manufacturer?

story.body: Diti Engineers specializes in manufacturing engineering parts for electric motors, submersible pumps, automobiles and industrial machinery. From CI casting to aluminum pressure die, we deliver application-specific components with dimensional accuracy, reliable material grades and competitive pricing for domestic and export buyers.

whyChoose.subtitle: We combine modern manufacturing capability with the responsiveness procurement teams need when scaling production.

quality.title: Quality product
quality.body: Consistent CI and aluminum grades, in-process inspection and repeat-order reliability for motor, pump and auto lines.

pricing.title: Competitive pricing
pricing.body: Direct manufacturer pricing without trading markup — structured for OEM volumes and long-term supply agreements.

delivery.title: Quick delivery
delivery.body: Rajkot-based production with predictable lead times and quote response within 24 hours on new inquiries.

experience.title: 13+ years experience
experience.body: Established proprietorship with GST registration since 2017 and a proven track record on IndiaMART.

leadership.bio: Led by H Rangani, Diti Engineers runs as a hands-on manufacturing operation focused on casting quality, on-time dispatch and long-term OEM partnerships across Gujarat and India.

cta.headline: Ready to partner with a casting manufacturer?
cta.subtitle: Share your drawing or requirement — we respond within one business day.

quote.question: Where can I request a quotation?
quote.answer: Use our quote form on this page or the contact section on the homepage. Share your drawing, material and volume — we respond within 24 hours.

materials.question: What materials do you cast?
materials.answer: We manufacture CI casting, aluminum casting and aluminum pressure die cast parts for motors, pumps, automotive and industrial applications.

leadTime.question: What is the typical lead time?
leadTime.answer: Lead time depends on part complexity and volume. We provide guidance with every quote and support repeat production schedules for OEM programs.

certifications.question: Are you GST registered?
certifications.answer: Yes. Diti Engineers is GST registered since July 2017 with statutory credentials available for vendor onboarding.
